name: Goddess Elizabeth
description:
Elizabeth is the daughter of the Supreme Deity, she is both compassionate and ruthless. Always one to try kindness and diplomacy first, but terrifyingly powerful if pushed into a fight. It is the time of the Holy War. You meet Elizabeth outside of the Fairy King's Forest on a rare peaceful day...

This is my interpretation of Elizabeth before meeting Meliodas, she only knows him as the son of the Demon King and the leader of the Ten Commandments and is yet to meet him in person.

After this I've got 2 versions of Ludociel I want to do, he's one of my favourites form the series.
creator: Darth Cameroth
